examples: Let's just chill at home tonight.
We spent the weekend chilling by the pool.
context: I'm back home in my PJs and ready to finally unwind and relax a bit. It's been such a crazy, busy weekend. I had so much fun though and made a ton of memories, but I am pretty worn out, and I feel like even though tomorrow's Monday, I need a recovery day. I don't want to go to work tomorrow. I just want to lay in bed and be lazy all day. Right now, I'm going to take off my makeup and chill before the week starts. I hope you all enjoyed this video. I had so much fun showing all of you what I got up to this weekend. There will be a lot more videos like this coming your way, so please stay tuned and check out the pins comment below. If you liked this video, please subscribe to our channel, comment below, and like the video. Thank you so much everybody, and I will see you next time. Good night!

examples: The prices here are absolutely insane.
context: The concert just finished, but it's raining as the dogs are now. So we're gonna hold tight for a little bit and wait for the rain. I finally made it home. Home sweet home. The weather outside is so messy and getting home was such a pain, but Olivia Rodrigo slayed. Her concert was amazing, and the crowd was insane. We had a riot. Now I'm just chugging tea because I feel like my voice is already getting whore, so I'm just going to rest and go to sleep early tonight because I have another fun and busy day ahead of me tomorrow. Good night everyone, sweet dreams.
